sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The board changed! Clicking on the top-center blue cell in the framed area changed it to red. This confirms my hypothesis: the game is about clicking on blue cells in the framed area to change them to red, matching one of the source patterns.
Now I need to figure out which pattern to match. Looking at the three source grids:
- Top-left: b R b / R . b / b R R
- Top-right: b R b / R . R / b R b
- Bottom-left: R b b / R . R / b b R
The center piece patterns might give a clue:
- Top-left center: asymmetric (grey on right/bottom)
- Top-right center: symmetric
- Bottom-left center: asymmetric (grey on top/bottom)
- Bottom-right center: symmetric
The bottom-right center piece is symmetric, similar to the top-right center piece. This suggests the framed area should match the top-right grid's pattern: b R b / R . R / b R b
So I need to change:
- Top-center (38, 46) - DONE (already red)
- Middle-left (46, 38)
- Middle-right (46, 54)
- Bottom-center (54, 46)
Let me batch these remaining 4 clicks.
